No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a Master's program, directly providing tertiary education (Target 4.3) and professional skills for employment and entrepreneurship (Target 4.4). It also covers sustainability (Target 4.7).
evidence: 習得相關進階專業知識（Students will acquire and apply expertise in their respective fields.）

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly mentions retail channels providing 'most job opportunities' (Target 8.5) and focuses on 'business management' and 'innovation' for economic productivity (Target 8.2, 8.3).
evidence: 零售通路也是提供最多就業機會的部門
創新方法、創業態度與面對變革的能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course emphasizes 'innovation' (Target 9.5) and addresses the 'transformation of physical channels' (infrastructure, Target 9.4) in retail management, aligning with industrial development.
evidence: 創新方法、創業態度與面對變革的能力
實體通路面臨轉型的挑戰
Management of Shopping Mall in Japan

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The study of 'Management of Shopping Mall in Japan' and 'establishment of physical channels' implies a connection to urban economic links and sustainable urbanization (Target 11.a, 11.3).
evidence: Management of Shopping Mall in Japan

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course explicitly aims for students to 'understand and be able to identify the ethics, social responsibility, and sustainability considerations of business situations' (Target 12.6).
evidence: 理解與辨別商業環境中道德、社會責任與永續議題

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to marine life.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to terrestrial ecosystems.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's focus on 'ethics' and 'social responsibility' in business (Core Competence B) provides a minimal, inferred link to developing accountable institutions (Target 16.6).
evidence: 道德、社會責任與永續議題

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course involves 'visiting Japan' and conducting 'comparative analysis' between regions, directly promoting international cooperation and knowledge sharing (Target 17.6).
evidence: 前往日本參訪不同發展階段及地理特色的企業
